description.overview: The largest of the three Schnauzer breeds, Giants are powerful, intelligent working dogs. They're loyal guardians and versatile workers.
description.history: The Giant Schnauzer originated in Germany.
description.temperament: Known for being loyal, alert, trainable.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their dense, wiry, harsh coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The largest of the three Schnauzer breeds, Giants are powerful, intelligent working dogs. They're loyal guardians and versatile workers.
